nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Add risk-based adaptive quorum fan-out: risk classifier in quick workflow Step 2.7 (Haiku subagent), wire risk_level into quorum dispatch (low=1/skip, medium=3, high=5), audit logging when quorum is reduced/skipped, --force-quorum override flag
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Implement risk-based adaptive quorum fan-out by adding a risk classifier in quick workflow Step 2.7 (Haiku subagent), wiring risk_level output into quorum dispatch logic (low=1/skip, medium=3, high=5), adding audit logging for quorum reduction/skip events, and introducing a --force-quorum override flag.
out_of_scope: Modifying the formal verification requirements envelope or category mappings
Changing the structure or schema of audit logs beyond risk-level tracking
Implementing machine learning or statistical models for risk classification (Haiku prompt-based heuristics only)
Altering quorum slot provider configuration or dual-subscription failover logic
Retrofitting risk classification to existing workflow steps beyond Step 2.7
